title: hebe cockayneana
intro: Hebe cockayneana, also known as Hebe 'Red Edge', is a popular ornamental shrub native to New Zealand, belonging to the hebe family (Plantaginaceae) and characterized by its attractive, red-tinged foliage and vibrant purple flowers. The leaves of Hebe cockayneana have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hebe cockayneana are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Hebe cockayneana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used as a natural remedy in traditional New Zealand medicine.
